LSE-MS8-L1-10001300-MSSCI8-MEC-EUR-02 • MS Science Grade 8 • Electric and Magnetic Forces and Their Affecting Factors

The Ørsted Table

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the girl want to put her observation on the sign?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the specific thing the girl says changes when she moves the compass. Identify it.
